environmentalIssues: Air quality (diesel particulate matter, health risk assessment)
Noise (24/7 operations, dock alarms, truck activity)
Traffic (810 net new daily PCE trips, LOS impacts)
Land use compatibility (proximity to school and residences)
technicalVulnerabilities: Health risk assessment (9.48 per million cancer risk vs. 10 per million threshold)
Dock door count discrepancy (HRA modeled 5 doors; TIA Footnote 1 confirms 36-door Option 2 plan)
SCAQMD formal deficiency letter (7 technical issues identified)
Nighttime noise (53.6 dBA modeled vs. 55.0 dBA threshold)
Southern truck driveway LOS E/F deficiency (acknowledged as unavoidable)
keyData.mitigationStatus: Initial Study/Mitigated Negative Declaration (IS/MND) — no full EIR
keyData.appealPath: Planning Commission → City Council (if applicant or public appeals PC decision)

protections: Anti-SLAPP defense (California Code of Civil Procedure §425.16)
No separate entity filing required until dispute arises
